violations.text: Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025
Various prepackaged meats with a white milky substance. PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025
Various pre packaged meats labeled with expiration dates od 12/24, 2/25. and 9/5/25.PIC voluntarily disposed of packages. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025

Inspector observed ROP smoked and salted fish and frozen seafood being stored in open case cooler and freezer. PIC informed. PIC voluntarily disposed of the fish product. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025
Inspector repackaged meats in retail display case lacking "packaged on" and/or "sell by dates".PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025

The presence of (flies ) is not controlled as evidenced by (live activity ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (retail food storage shelves ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025
The (ceilings ) in the (retail) area is in poor repair.Observed water stains The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025
Inspector observed several food packages adulterated with a white, milky substance. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025
Inspector observed several meat packages labeled with expiration dates for 10/2021, 08/2024, 10/2024 and 12/2024. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025
Inspector observed repackaged raw meats, located in the retail display case, lacking "packaged on" and "sell by" dates. Owner informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025

Pre packaged sausage in open case cooler were observed to be beyond the sell-by date. PIC disposed of at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2024

The presence of (flies) is not controlled as evidenced by (live activity ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2024
A shovel were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.PIC moved to 3 bay sink to be wash and sanitized and knife holder to be cleaned and sanitized prior to use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024
Dairy products in open case cooler were observed to be beyond the sell-by date. PIC disposed of at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024

Various produce items packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

Inspector observed dead flies on glues traps throughout the establishment PIC informed to remove traps. PIC informed of pcs treatment for flies. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024
Food product and beverages were observed stored on the floor in the throughout the establishment. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024

Inspector observed knives being stored between walls and pipes. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (ice machine) have an accumulation of black residue. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024
The ceilings throughout establishment is in poor repair. Observed water stains and/or missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
